manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v53

- Redesigned the tagging section in posts, with suggested users now showing up for a quicker access.
- Redesigned the connections in the profiles, which now look way more clean.
- Redesigned the viewers section in stories.
- You can now reply to reels in chats with a camera photo, media, voice messages and GIPHY stickers.
- Now, when you're playing songs sent in chats, you can see the lyrics in the cover.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
